_comment: Curated evidence priors. Auditable, human-readable, and the ONLY thing a recommendation may be grounded in (besides a retrieved passage). direction: + (factor up -> outcome up), - (factor up -> outcome down). strength: weak|moderate|strong. Citations are seed placeholders — replace with peer-reviewed sources before any clinical/public use.

priors.note: Nights under ~6h, and irregular sleep timing, frequently precede next-day attacks.
Falling barometric pressure is a reported correlate for weather-sensitive people.
Poor or short sleep tends to coincide with higher next-day anxiety.
Large night-to-night swings in sleep timing precede attacks more than stable sleep.

priors.citation: MindMap seed summary — Mood, activity & routines
priors.note: Stretches of very low activity sometimes precede lower mood; direction uncertain.

priors.citation: MindMap seed summary — Mood, activity & routines
priors.note: Gaps in usual routine can appear alongside dips in mood or sleep.

priors.citation: MindMap seed summary — Mood, activity & routines
priors.note: More time outside / regular activity tends to coincide with steadier mood.

priors.citation: MindMap seed summary — Mood, activity & routines
priors.note: Increased energy with reduced need for sleep is a tracked pattern around mood elevation. Review with a professional.
